title: Tricalysia dubia
intro: Tricalysia dubia is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Rubiales or coffee family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which may aid in the treatment of various diseases, including fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. The bioactive constituents of Tricalysia dubia include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Tricalysia dubia is typically used in traditional medicine and can be found in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
